author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 5 APPROVE (clean). 4 BROKEN tests (#1030-#1033) strengthened heterogeneously: typed-alias + real invocation (#1030), file-content byte-window verification + sabotage probe (#1031, #1032), partial-compute check + off-by-one divisor sabotage probe (#1033). Sabotage demo: m.update(&(loss * 2.0)) caught at partial-compute assertion line 1212 (expected 2.5, got 5). No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
